Print plan copies
description:
Send to ER Copy Center and request 2 copies:
•one set on poly paper 24x36 (jobsite plan station)
•one set on regular paper 24x36 (office)

name: Submit Utilities Application
description: MUST BE SUBMITTED BEFORE OCT 15 TO AVOID WINTER CHARGES

name: Give homeowner plan set
description: Give at site staking if present

name: Order Windows
description:
check lead times, could be 6-18 weeks.
place final window order copy in jobsite plan station.

name: Foundation cure time
description: must be at least 10 long days between date of pour and backfilling (including weekend days)

name: Request final cabinet layout
description: Need to have before framing to place accommodations; place in jobsite plan station.

name: Post pour: drain tile, waterproofing, strip forms
Well line rough-in
description: must be done before basement floor poured and preferably before backfill

name: Inspection: Foundation & Underfloor
description: try to do this at the same time

name: Add basement stone for radon mitigation
description: try to coordinate with backfill so excavator can deliver and spread in the hole

name: Backfill foundation
description: must be 10 days from date of wall pour (including weekends)

name: Septic
description: This can be done earlier in the project if machines can move around it on the site; otherwise if it interferes with working around the building, schedule as late as possible. Time of year is a consideration also.

name: Notify WPS/WE site ready
description:
MUST BE SITE READY FOR UTILITY CO BEFORE NOV 15 TO AVOID WINTER CHARGES

We call to let them know it is ready. They will check that they received inspection from inspector. Sometimes they don't get it right away. WE Energies requires us to complete a site ready card.

name: Setup jobsite plan station
description:
Include:
•plan set on 24x36 poly paper
•final cabinet layout
•final window order
•fireplace framing
•other necessary framing info

name: Electrical Allowance
description:
Placeholder Cost Bucket for Future Tile Selection. 

Balance will be reimbursed if Allowance is not met by Material Selections.

name: Send Electrical CO
description: Must be sent and approved prior to rough-in

name: HVAC Measure
description: Try to have Mike or Andrew present for this

name: Electrical walkthrough CO
description: Change order issued to balance difference bw original allowances and changes at walkthrough

name: Well drilling
description:
Andrew likes this to be done when no one else is on site if possible, not a big deal

Must be done between May and Sept.

name: Shower door measure
description: schedule approx 6 weeks prior to install

name: Hardwood floors
description: date depends on selection: hardwood areas before cabinets; LVP areas after cabinets

name: LVP/LVT floors
description: date depends on selection: hardwood areas before cabinets; LVP areas after cabinets

name: Countertop measure
description: approx 4 weeks to install granite/quartz; 2-3 weeks for laminate; check with Julie

name: Laminate countertop install
description: Approx 2-4 weeks from measure, depends on style of edging

name: AC set & HVAC fire-up
description: coordinate with gas stove install so it can be done at once

name: Gas stove install
description: coordinate with AC & HVAC fireup so it can be done at once

name: Whole-house generator installation
description: typically at end of project; can be done after siding is complete if begin installed in an unfinished basement?? check on that. They do not install Nov-frost.

name: Internal Punch List
description: See checklist below for items to complete. Assign appropriate crew members.

name: Project Photos
description: Take photos for Social Media Posts

name: Final inspection
description: When Internal Punch List is complete.

name: Prepare Client Gift
description:
Include Thank You Note

Dear ____________,

Thank you for the opportunity to build your _____________. We truly appreciate the trust you placed in us to craft your vision. We valued your partnership throughout the process as well. Thank you! 

-Andrew, Ashley & the Lakefront Crew

Hi __________,

As we are wrapping up, I am hoping you would be willing to leave us a review on Google and Facebook (links below). Let me know if you have any questions or concerns.

Google: https://g.page/r/CSj7Pkcbs2KrEB0/review
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LakefrontBD/

Thank you for considering!

name: Kerdi 215 sq. ft. 39 in. W x 65 ft. L x 8 mm T Waterproofing Membrane Underlayment for Tile
description: Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/20M covers 215 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. This membrane features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

name: Kerdi 3 ft. 3 in. x 16 ft. 5 in. Waterproofing Membrane
description: Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/5M covers 54 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. name: Kerdi 323 sq.ft. 79 x in. W 49 x ft. L x 8 mm T Waterproofing Membrane Underlayment for Tile
description: KERDI200200/15M is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. This 6 ft. 7 in. wide roll covers the wall from the floor to a standard shower head height. This creates fewer seams and a quicker installation time. The membrane is 8 mil thick and features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

name: Kerdi-Board 1/2 in. x 48 in. x 96 in. Building Panel
description: Kerdi-Board is a multifunctional tile substrate and building panel that can be used for creating bonded waterproofing assemblies with tile coverings. Kerdi-Board is made from an extruded polystyrene foam panel, with a special reinforcement material on both sides and fleece webbing for effective anchoring in thinset mortar. It can be used in the creation of a broad range of building elements, such as showers and bathtub surrounds.

name: Kerdi-Board-SB 38 in. x 11-1/2 in. Rectangular Shower Bench
description: Kerdi-Board-SB is a prefabricated shower bench designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower-System. It is lightweight, waterproof and ready to tile making installation quick and easy. The bench is made of Kerdi-Board and comes with Kerdi-Kereck waterproofing corners.

description: Kerdi-Board-SN 12 in. x 12 in. Shower Niche is a prefabricated shower niche made of Schluter-Kerdi-Board. Lightweight for ease of installing. Waterproof for your shower installation.

name: Kerdi 215 sq. ft. 39 in. W x 65 ft. L x 8 mm T Waterproofing Membrane Underlayment for Tile
description: Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/20M covers 215 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. This membrane features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

name: Kerdi 3 ft. 3 in. x 16 ft. 5 in. Waterproofing Membrane
description: Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/5M covers 54 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. This membrane features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

name: Kerdi 3 ft. 3 in. x 33 ft. Waterproofing Membrane
description: Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/10M covers 108 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. This membrane features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

name: Kerdi 323 sq.ft. 79 x in. W 49 x ft. L x 8 mm T Waterproofing Membrane Underlayment for Tile
description: KERDI200200/15M is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. This 6 ft. 7 in. wide roll covers the wall from the floor to a standard shower head height. This creates fewer seams and a quicker installation time. The membrane is 8 mil thick and features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

name: Kerdi-Board 1/2 in. x 48 in. x 96 in. Building Panel
description: Kerdi-Board is a multifunctional tile substrate and building panel that can be used for creating bonded waterproofing assemblies with tile coverings. Kerdi-Board is made from an extruded polystyrene foam panel, with a special reinforcement material on both sides and fleece webbing for effective anchoring in thinset mortar. It can be used in the creation of a broad range of building elements, such as showers and bathtub surrounds.

name: Kerdi-Board-SB 38 in. x 11-1/2 in. Rectangular Shower Bench
description: Kerdi-Board-SB is a prefabricated shower bench designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower-System. It is lightweight, waterproof and ready to tile making installation quick and easy. The bench is made of Kerdi-Board and comes with Kerdi-Kereck waterproofing corners.

name: Kerdi-Board-SC 48 in. x 6 in. x 4-1/2 in. Shower Curb
description: Kerdi-Board-SC is a lightweight, prefabricated shower curb. It is made of Kerdi-Board and is designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower System. This curb is waterproof and only the joints and corners need to be sealed to complete waterproofing.

name: Kerdi-Board-SC 60 in. x 6 in. x 4-1/2 in. Shower Curb

The shower tray eliminates the need for a mortar bed making installation quick and easy. The Kerdi-Shower-T/-TS/-TT is designed to integrate with the Schluter-Kerdi-Drain.

name: Kerdi-Kereck-F Pre-Formed 90° Waterproofing Inside Corners (2-Pack)
description: Kerdi-Kereck-F are preformed, seamless corners for waterproofing the corners of Kerdi and Ditra assemblies to prevent leaks. The 4 mil thickness helps minimize build-up in the corners. The KERECK/FI2 is a package of 2 inside corners.

name: Kerdi-Kereck-F Pre-Formed 90° Waterproofing Outside Corners (2-Pack)
description: Kerdi-Kereck-F are preformed, seamless corners for waterproofing the corners of Kerdi and Ditra assemblies to prevent leaks. The 4 mil thickness helps minimize build-up in the corners. The KERECK/FA2 is a package of 2 outside corners.

name: Kerdi-Seal-MV 4-1/2 in. Mixing Valve Seal with Rubber Gasket
description: Kerdi-Seal-MV is a prefabricated waterproofing seal with over-molded rubber gasket. It is designed to protect moisture sensitive backing panels at the mixing valve in Kerdi Shower installations. The KMSMV235/114 has a 4-1/2 in. mixing valve opening.

name: Kerdi-Seal-PS 6-3/4 in. x 6-3/4 in. x 4 mil Pipe Seal Underlayment with 3/4 in. Rubber Gasket
description: Kerdi-Seal-PS is a prefabricated waterproofing seal with over-molded rubber gasket. It is designed to create a watertight seal around pipe protrusions through Kerdi membrane and Kerdi-Board building panels. The seals are made of Kerdi and the 4-mil thickness helps minimize build-up.

name: Kerdi-Band 5 in. x 32 ft. 10 in. x 4 mil Underlayment Waterproofing Strip
description: Kerdi-Band is a waterproofing strip for sealing butt joints and floor/wall connections with Kerdi and Ditra membranes. It is installed with unmodified thinset to ensure a fully water-tight seal to prevent leaks. The 4 mil thickness of the Kerdi-Band helps prevent build up under the tile.

name: Kerdi-Fix 290 ml Bright White Sealing/Bonding Compound
description: Kerdi-Fix is a single-component sealing and bonding compound with a silane-modified polymer base. It is elastomeric and bonds well to most materials. Kerdi-Fix is odor-neutral, UV- and weather-resistant, and contains no solvents. It is suitable for use as a sealant and can be used to bond Kerdi-Band and Kerdi waterproofing membrane to fixed building elements.

name: Kerdi-Fix 290 ml Gray Tile Edge Sealing/Bonding Compound
description: Kerdi-Fix is a single-component sealing and bonding compound with a silane-modified polymer base. It is elastomeric and bonds well to most materials. Kerdi-Fix is odor-neutral, UV- and weather-resistant, and contains no solvents. It is suitable for use as a sealant and can be used to bond Kerdi-Band and Kerdi waterproofing membrane to fixed building elements.

name: Kerdi-Drain 4 in. Chrome Drain Grate
description: The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square drain grate comes with a frame, height adjustment collar and lateral adjustment ring. The grate accommodates tiles 1/4 in. to 1-1/4 in. thick and allows for lateral and tilt adjustment. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.

name: Kerdi-Drain 4 in. Matte Black Floral Drain Grate
description: The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square drain grate comes with a frame, height adjustment collar and lateral adjustment ring. The grate accommodates tiles 1/4 in. to 1-1/4 in. thick and allows for lateral and tilt adjustment. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.

The grate accommodates tiles 1/4 in. to 1-1/4 in. thick and allows for lateral and tilt adjustment. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.

name: Kerdi-Drain 4 in. Tileable Drain Grate Floor Installation Kit for Accessory
description: The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square tileable drain support comes with a spacer and lateral adjustment ring. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.

name: Kerdi-Drain 2 in. PVC Flange
description: The Kerdi-Drain flange is designed for use with the Kerdi-Shower-T/-TS/-TT shower trays and mortar bed shower applications. The package contains a bonding flange, Kerdi-Kereck waterproof corners, Kerdi-Seal mixing valve seal and Kerdi-Seal pipe seal. The Kerdi-Drain flange can be used in both commercial and residential applications. This flange is to be used with Kerdi-Drain grates which are sold separate.

name: Kerdi-Drain 4 in. Brushed Stainless Steel Floral Drain Grate
description: The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square drain grate comes with a frame, height adjustment collar and lateral adjustment ring. The grate accommodates tiles 1/4 in. to 1-1/4 in. thick and allows for lateral and tilt adjustment. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.
